title: Properly handle Hostname inside of RUN command
body:
This will get buildah bud to follow docker build handling of
hostname environment variable and hostname command properly

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Change looks ok to me, but some of the tests got knocked over with it.

```
not ok 189 uts-namespace
# (from function `general_namespace' in file ./namespaces.bats, line 275,
#  in test file ./namespaces.bats, line 350)
#   `general_namespace uts' failed
# uts:[4026531838]
# alpine-working-container
# uts:[4026532238]
# alpine-working-container-1
# uts:[4026532238]
# alpine-working-container-2
# error running container: error creating container for [/usr/bin/readlink /proc/self/ns/uts]: unable to set hostname without a private UTS namespace
# : exit status 1
# error while running runtime: exit status 1
```
